select.isEqual:
SELECT DISTINCT A.c_clubno, closestate, D.c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ c_clubname, username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ username, A.c_sysopid, applicationdate FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id INNER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB D ON A.c_clubno = D.c_clubno AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id WHERE
B.$v_S_RADIO$ LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%'
D.$v_S_RADIO$ LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%'
AND D.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY applicationdate DESC
select.isNotEqual:
SELECT DISTINCT A.c_clubno, closestate, D.c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ c_clubname, username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ username, A.c_sysopid, applicationdate FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id INNER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB D ON A.c_clubno = D.c_clubno AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id WHERE
B.$v_S_RADIO$ LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%'
D.$v_S_RADIO$ LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%'
AND D.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY $v_SORT1$ $v_SORT2$

select.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.c_clubno, closestate, D.c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ c_clubname, username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ username, A.c_sysopid, applicationdate FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id INNER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB D ON A.c_clubno = D.c_clubno AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id WHERE D.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY applicationdate DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.c_clubno, closestate, D.c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ c_clubname, username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ username, A.c_sysopid, applicationdate FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id INNER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB D ON A.c_clubno = D.c_clubno AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id WHERE D.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY $v_SORT1$ $v_SORT2$

sqlMap.select:
SELECT NVL(COUNT(C1.c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE C1 INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(C1.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND C1.tenant_id = B.tenant_id INNER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB ON TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno = C1.c_clubno WHERE
B.$v_S_RADIO$ LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%'
C1.$v_S_RADIO$ LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%'
AND B.companyid = #companyID# AND TBL_C_CLUB.companyid = #companyID# AND C1.tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(DISTINCT C1.c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE C1 INNER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB ON TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno = C1.c_clubno WHERE TBL_C_CLUB.companyid = #companyID# AND C1.tenant_id = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT c_clubno, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ c_clubname, username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ username, c_sysopid, c_regdate FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE $v_S_RADIO$ LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' AND A.c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.c_regdate DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT c_clubno, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ c_clubname, username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ username, c_sysopid, c_regdate FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE $v_S_RADIO$ LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' AND A.c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY $v_SORT1$ $v_SORT2$

select.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT c_clubno, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ c_clubname, username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ username, c_sysopid, c_regdate FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = B.userid AND A.c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE A.companyID = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.c_regdate DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT c_clubno, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ c_clubname, username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ username, c_sysopid, c_regdate FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE A.companyID = #companyID# WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY $v_SORT1$ $v_SORT2$

sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(DISTINCT c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON TRIM(A.c_sysopid) = TRIM(B.userID) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE $v_S_RADIO$ LIKE '%' || #v_KEYWORD# || '%' AND c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND companyid = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT c_clubno, c_clubname, TRIM(c_sysopid) AS c_sysopid, c_clubdesc, c_regdate, DEPTID FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT c_clubno, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN c_clubname ELSE c_clubname2 END AS c_clubname, c_sysopid, c_clubdesc, c_regdate, DEPTID FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN (SELECT T.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY T.CN ORDER BY ROWNUM) CNT FROM ((SELECT D.CN, D.DEPARTMENT as DEPTID, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANYID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT B.cn, A2.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as COMPANYID, A2.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A2 ON A2.CN = B.CN AND A2.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A2.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID# WHERE B.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME <> #companyID#)) T ) TR ON TRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = TR.CN AND TR.CNT = 1 AND A.TENANT_ID = TR.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = TR.COMPANYID
WHERE c_clubno IN (SELECT c_clubno FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE c_clubdesc LIKE '%' || #v_STRQUERY# || '%' AND companyid = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#) AND c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
WHERE c_clubno IN (SELECT c_clubno FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN c_clubname ELSE c_clubname2 END LIKE '%' || #v_STRQUERY# || '%' AND companyid = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#) AND c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
WHERE c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
ORDER BY c_regdate ASC) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_IQUERYCOUNT#) ORDER BY c_regdate DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <=10

SELECT NVL(COUNT(c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_CLUB
WHERE c_clubno IN (SELECT c_clubno FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE c_clubdesc LIKE '%' || #v_STRQUERY# || '%' AND tenant_id = #tenantID#) AND c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND companyid = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
WHERE c_clubno IN (SELECT c_clubno FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ LIKE '%' || #v_STRQUERY# || '%' AND tenant_id = #tenantID#) AND c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND companyid = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
WHERE c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND companyid = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT c_sysopid, c_clubgubun, isin, c_clubdesc, c_clubconfirmtype, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ AS c_clubname, RTRIM(c_cate_a) AS C_CATE_A, RTRIM(c_cate_b) AS C_CATE_B, RTRIM(c_cate_c) AS C_CATE_C FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_CLUB SET c_cate_a = #v_C_CATE_A#, c_cate_b = #v_C_CATE_B#, c_cate_c = #v_C_CATE_C#, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ = #v_C_CLUBNAME#, isin = 2 WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT closereason FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_clubdesc FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_COMCLOSE SET closestate = #v_PCLOSESTATE# WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_C_CLUB SET c_adminconfirm = 'C' WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT B.email EMAIL, B.username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ USERNAME, A.c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.companyid = B.companyid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_CLUB SET c_adminconfirm = 'Y' WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO USER (userid, usernm, passwd, empno, emptype, deptid, positionid, jobtitleid, status, email, mobiletel, officetel, fax, hometel, userintro, joindate, retiredate, totalmileage, recentmileage, seq, regdate, photopath, conlevel, subdeptid, roleinfo, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_CODE#, #v_COMNAME#, '', '', 'W', 'TOP', 1, 1, 'W', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, #v_pNow#, #v_pNow#, 0, 0, NULL, #v_pNow#, NULL, '', NULL, 'C', #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO ROLE (userid, roletype, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_CODE#, 'C', #tenantID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT B.email EMAIL, B.username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ USERNAME, A.c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.companyid = B.companyid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN username ELSE username2 END AS username FROM TBL_C_MEMBERINFO WHERE RTRIM(userid) = #v_ID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
